purpose: Freeze the approved V2 launch products, debit-first settlement, prepaid Tencent procurement, account-owned Gateway access, read-only customer financial projection, and reusable verification boundary without claiming unfinished runtime evidence.
machineBoundary: Six product surfaces including OPL Serve planned_not_in_launch, four implementation owner lanes, two customer products, ten launch stages, six delivery phases, and one guarded production verification slot.

lifecycle.removalCondition: Replace only with a newer approved launch freeze and matching contract tests.

architectureAuthority.rule: The upstream repository owns target product boundaries; this contract owns current implementation choices, exact prices, and delivery gaps.

preconditions: read-only provider capacity and price preflight
monthlySettlement.retryRule: Debit, refund, provider mutation, claim, activation, renewal, Secret write, and receipt use stable operation-scoped idempotency identities.
monthlySettlement.currentImplementation: Debit-first orchestration, confirmed-absence refund, and operator review resolution are CI-verified; production rollout and live reconciliation evidence remain pending.

providerProcurement.capacityCheck: Read-only PREPAID inventory, compatibility, quota, and price check before debit; it must not create or reserve a resource.
providerProcurement.currentImplementation: One-month PREPAID CVM/CBS requests, stable operations, and provider readback are CI-verified; live Tencent evidence remains pending.

gateway.currentImplementation: Control Plane capability calls no longer gate on the reported Sub2API version. Request usage, aggregate stats, and customer billing receipt projections remain unimplemented and lack production evidence.

perRunCleanup: test Workspace Deployment, Service, and Secret
verification.purchaseRule: Purchase once only when read-only inventory proves that no reusable compliant slot exists; ambiguous or multiple candidates stop without purchase.
verification.productionSmoke: Read-only service and existing-resource checks; no monthly charge and no provider mutation.
verification.currentImplementation: The legacy verifier spends real monthly balance and creates then deletes provider resources; it is blocked until replaced.

launchStages.business: A mapped customer signs in and sees Basic and Pro with separate compute and storage prices; the internal verification slot never appears.
launchStages.currentState: Basic mapping exists; Pro and the V2 catalog still require implementation and deployed evidence.

launchStages.business: The customer sees live Sub2API balance and an exact monthly compute plus storage quote before side effects.
launchStages.currentState: Live balance and Basic quote exist; Pro and complete storage presentation remain incomplete.

launchStages.business: After read-only preflight, the exact monthly amount is debited once with a deterministic Redeem Code before any provider write.
launchStages.currentState: Debit-first ordering and replay are CI-verified; live Sub2API evidence is pending.

launchStages.business: Fabric opens one-month PREPAID CVM and CBS only after debit.
launchStages.currentState: PREPAID CVM/CBS requests and readback are CI-verified; live Tencent evidence is pending.

launchStages.business: Entitlements activate only after all billable provider resources are identified and assigned.
launchStages.currentState: Claim, confirmed-absence refund, and manual-review resolution are CI-verified; live reconciliation evidence is pending.

launchStages.business: The customer authenticates to a ready Workspace backed by owned compute, CBS, and an account-scoped Gateway Secret.
launchStages.currentState: Attachment, account Secret, readiness, and runtime isolation are CI-verified; browser, WebSocket, and live model evidence are pending.

launchStages.business: The owner can reveal the account's opl-workspace Key, make a metered Workspace model request, and inspect its customer-safe cost and Token facts.
launchStages.currentState: Balance and Key summary exist; request-level usage, aggregate stats, customer-safe projection, and live evidence remain incomplete.

launchStages.business: Customer and Tencent periods renew once with debit-first recovery, manual Tencent renewal, and provider readback.
launchStages.currentState: Entitlement renewal exists; PREPAID provider renewal and debit-first recovery do not.

launchStages.business: Every release proves the real Workspace and Gateway path without buying or deleting monthly Tencent resources per run.
launchStages.currentState: The legacy verifier charges and creates then deletes resources on every run.

launchStages.business: A release is ready only from merged code, immutable Cloud and App images, runtime checks, rollback proof, and reusable verification.
launchStages.currentState: CI and rollout exist; immutable App deployment, recovery, browser, Gateway, and safe verification evidence remain incomplete.
